summary: If true, LEF (or OA cells) will have process antenna consistency checks done for LEF MACRO PIN ANTENNA* data (or equivalent OA data) attached to their pins. Input pins with 0 gate-area, output pins with 0 diff-area, and inout pins with 0 gate-area or 0 diff-area values will generate warnings. If false, no consistency checking is done.
